---
title: 'A Comparative Review of De-escalation Training: What Works and Why'
author: Seth Watts, Carlena Orosco, Michael D. White
date: '2026-02-16'
subtitle: CrimRxiv
doi: 10.21428/cb6ab371.d88be0db
citation-url: https://doi.org/10.21428/cb6ab371.d88be0db
format:
  html:
    toc: true
---


::: {.callout-warning}
## 🔬 Preprint
This is a preprint that has not undergone peer review. Findings should be interpreted with caution.
:::

## Publication Details

**Published in:** CrimRxiv

**Open Access:** Yes

## Links

[DOI Link](https://doi.org/10.21428/cb6ab371.d88be0db) | [PDF](https://www.crimrxiv.com/pub/69g05cuu/download/pdf) | [OpenAlex](https://openalex.org/W7129007292)
